_about: Round-1 source-grounded baseline, recorded from the ad-hoc investigation (issue #34, handoff 2026-06-13). The full_run numbers are the historical 121-graded LLM-question run; the frozen sampled suite (tests/eval/ground_truth_sampled.py, 40 cases) uses DETERMINISTIC questions and will NOT reproduce 68/121 exactly. On the first PARTS_EVAL_LIVE run, re-record `frozen_sampled` from the frozen question set (see frozen_sampled.status). The pass_rate gate compares against `frozen_sampled` once recorded; until then it is informational.

frozen_sampled.status: NOT YET RECORDED - run `PARTS_EVAL_LIVE=1 parts-lookup-eval` once to populate
